failedAssertions.reason: Submitter edit/resubmit UX is not exposed in the tested UI path.
Contract-specified notification bell content/badge updates were not present; only approvals queue/status counters reflected events.
UI did not present the required disabled Approve control with tooltip copy from the assertion.

appliedUpdates.description: Added planning approval guidance for changes-requested flows where submitter rows may be view-only and API resubmit bootstrap is needed before UI verification.
